seoTitle: Arno Bay vs Arthurton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Arno Bay and Arthurton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Arno Bay vs Arthurton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arno Bay and Arthurton.
heading: Arno Bay vs Arthurton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arno Bay, South Australia and Arthurton, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arno Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Arthurton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arno Bay or Arthurton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arno Bay has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Arthurton scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arno Bay scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Arthurton scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arno Bay or Arthurton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arno Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
